purpose: Indexed task contract for an AI CLI application to plan and execute deterministic directory cleanup + organization (inventory -> plan -> gated execution -> verification -> documentation) with registry-backed identity (file_id/dir_id), strict group sequencing (validators/tests/schemas), and support for paper-move planning without premature finalization steps.
principles: Fail-closed: do not modify filesystem until a complete Move Map exists and a proceed gate is satisfied.
No deletes by default: export/archive outside TARGET_DIR with timestamped destination; keep relative paths.
No silent overwrites: conflicts are logged and skipped unless an explicit override rule exists.
Reconciliation math must close: pre_count == post_count + exported_count (+ quarantined_count if used).
Deterministic artifacts: every run emits the same artifact set and schema.
Identity-first operations: file selection and planning is done by file_id (and dir_id for folders) when available; paths are treated as mutable attributes.
Staged finalization: avoid costly final-location assumptions (reference rewrites and registry/ledger commitments) until an explicit finalization mode is enabled.

files.name: 00_SCOPE.json
files.purpose: Captured inputs, effective configuration, exclusions, authority selection, run metadata, group plan, and registry integration mode.

files.name: 00_INVENTORY.csv
files.purpose: One row per file discovered (src_rel, size, mtime, ext, optional sha256, classification_hints). Optionally includes resolved file_id and owning_dir_id if registry available.

files.name: 00_EXISTING_DOCS_INDEX.md
files.purpose: Detected intent docs and notes; operator-designated authority is recorded.

files.name: 00_TARGET_STRUCTURE.md
files.purpose: Proposed bucket structure and one-line purpose for each bucket.

files.name: 00_MOVE_MAP.csv
files.purpose: Single action contract: every inventory file has exactly one disposition. May include group field or be emitted per-group.

files.name: 00_EXECUTION_LOG.jsonl
files.purpose: Append-only event stream of all actions, skips, conflicts, and errors.

files.name: 00_EXPORT_LOG.csv
files.purpose: Exported (archived) items with dst paths and reasons.

files.name: 00_CONFLICTS.csv
files.purpose: Destination collisions, path-length issues, case-insensitive conflicts, permission failures.

files.name: 00_VERIFY_REPORT.md
files.purpose: Counts before/after, reconciliation math, integrity checks, and (if enabled) link/import validation results.

files.name: 00_README.md
files.purpose: Root navigation + how to use the organized structure; includes archive export location.

files.name: 00_ROLLBACK.ps1
files.purpose: Generated reverse-operations script derived from Move Map and execution log.

files.name: 00_GROUP_STATUS.json
files.purpose: Group-by-group status (planned/executed/verified), gates passed/failed, and any halts. Enforces sequential processing.

files.name: 00_ID_GAP_REPORT.csv
files.purpose: Report of files/dirs missing file_id/dir_id, duplicates, and proposed IDs when ID_MODE=propose_only.

files.name: 00_PAPER_MOVE_MAP.csv
files.purpose: Optional: proposed final destinations without execution (used when PAPER_MOVE_MAP_ONLY=true).

files.name: 00_REGISTRY_PATCH_INTENT.json
files.purpose: Optional: RFC-6902-style patch intent limited to non-authoritative fields (e.g., notes/path_aliases) when REGISTRY_MODE=patch_intent_only.

task_index.name: Initialize Run
task_index.objective: Create run_id, resolve and validate inputs, write scope artifact, configure groups, and enforce fail-closed invariants.
actions: Generate run_id (timestamp + short hash).
Resolve TARGET_DIR and BACKUP_BASE_DIR to absolute paths.
Validate BACKUP_BASE_DIR is outside TARGET_DIR.
Apply EXCLUDE_DIRS, EXCLUDE_GLOBS, FOLLOW_SYMLINKS.
Resolve GROUPS and enforce strict order.
Create run_root and artifact files skeleton.
Write 00_SCOPE.json with effective config (including FINALIZATION_MODE, ID_MODE, REGISTRY_MODE, PAPER_MOVE_MAP_ONLY).
acceptance: run_root exists
00_SCOPE.json written
invalid configuration halts before any filesystem changes

task_index.name: Filesystem Discovery Inventory
task_index.objective: Enumerate files deterministically and produce the canonical inventory list (optionally augmented with registry identity).
actions: Walk TARGET_DIR recursively (respect exclusions; do not follow symlinks unless enabled).
Collect per-file: src_abs, src_rel, size_bytes, mtime_utc, ext, optionally sha256.
Record flags: is_symlink, is_reparse_point, is_hidden, path_length.
If REGISTRY_MODE != disabled and REGISTRY_PATH provided: lookup file_id (and owning_dir_id if available) by current path and/or ID prefix conventions where applicable.
Write 00_INVENTORY.csv sorted by src_rel.
acceptance: Inventory row count equals discovered file count
Inventory sorted deterministically
If HASH_MODE=sha256 then sha256 present for all eligible files

task_index.name: Discover Existing Intent Docs
task_index.objective: Find and index any docs that claim authority or describe purpose/classification.
actions: Search for likely authority docs (00_README.md, manifests, classification docs, contracts).
Extract minimal metadata: path, title line, last modified, declared scope markers if present.
Require operator-designated authority selection; never infer authority from timestamps alone.
Write 00_EXISTING_DOCS_INDEX.md and update 00_SCOPE.json authority field.
acceptance: Index produced even if empty
Authority selection recorded (or explicitly 'none')
failure_modes: Ambiguous authority not resolved -> halt if configured gating

task_index.name: Cross-Directory Overlap Scan
task_index.objective: Optionally scan related dirs (siblings/operational dirs) to detect duplicates and define canonical locations.
actions: If RELATED_DIRS provided: inventory them using same rules.
Detect duplicates by sha256 (preferred) or (name+size) as pre-filter.
Classify overlaps: identical, similar, unique.
Emit overlap report (00_OVERLAP_REPORT.csv) and recommended actions.
acceptance: Duplicates identified by hash where possible
No actions executed in this task

task_index.name: ID Coverage and Proposal
task_index.objective: Assess file_id/dir_id coverage using current registry conventions and produce non-destructive proposals in staging mode.
actions: If ID_MODE=off: write empty 00_ID_GAP_REPORT.csv and continue.
If ID_MODE in {propose_only, assign_on_create_only}: detect missing file_id/dir_id in inventory scope.
Generate proposed IDs for missing items following established allocator rules (proposal only; no renames).
Record conflicts: duplicate IDs, multiple files with same apparent ID prefix, malformed prefixes.
Write 00_ID_GAP_REPORT.csv.
acceptance: Report produced even if empty
No filesystem changes occur in propose_only mode
failure_modes: Unresolvable ID conflicts if configured to halt

task_index.name: Define Target Taxonomy Structure
task_index.objective: Produce the destination folder structure to organize the directory.
actions: Select or construct taxonomy buckets appropriate to DIR_TYPE.
Ensure buckets exist for runtime, tools, schemas/config, tests, docs, archive.
Write 00_TARGET_STRUCTURE.md with bucket purposes and examples.
acceptance: Structure is complete and consistent with TAXONOMY input

task_index.name: Classify Files Into Dispositions (Grouped)
task_index.objective: Assign every file a single disposition: move, keep, export, quarantine; processed strictly group-by-group.
actions: For each group in GROUPS in order: filter inventory using GROUP_FILTERS[group].
Apply classification heuristics: extension, folder hints, naming patterns, reference scanning (optional), authority rules.
If ACTIVE_ONLY_POLICY=true: default non-active to export unless explicitly kept or needs_review.
Mark uncertain items as needs_review and default to keep (fail-safe).
Generate group Move Map subset (either separate file per group or one combined map with group column).
If PAPER_MOVE_MAP_ONLY=true: also generate 00_PAPER_MOVE_MAP.csv with proposed final destinations (no execution).
acceptance: Move Map covers 100% of in-scope group inventory rows (1:1 mapping per group pass)
No duplicate dst_rel unless explicitly allowed and handled
All actions are in {move, keep, export, quarantine}

task_index.name: Validate Move Map (Grouped)
task_index.objective: Prove the Move Map is safe to execute before any changes, per group.
actions: For each group in order: validate all src exist and are within allowed scope.
Verify destination rules: by default dst must be within TARGET_DIR; if ALLOW_CROSS_ROOT_MOVES=true then dst may be in allowlisted RELATED_DIRS.
Detect collisions: case-insensitive duplicates, existing dst, path-length overflow.
Write 00_CONFLICTS.csv; if conflicts exist, halt unless override rules exist.
acceptance: No unhandled conflicts
All destination paths valid
If conflicts exist, execution is blocked

task_index.name: Proceed Gate (Grouped)
task_index.objective: Require explicit operator approval to move from planning to execution, per group.
actions: For each group: present summary (counts by action, key conflicts, archive destination, expected reconciliation math).
Require explicit proceed token (e.g., 'PROCEED_RUN {run_id} GROUP {group_name}').
If not provided, stop with no filesystem changes for that group and all subsequent groups.
acceptance: No execution occurs without proceed token

task_index.name: Create Destination Folders
task_index.objective: Create the target structure and archive/quarantine destinations.
actions: Create all taxonomy bucket directories.
Create archive destination: BACKUP_BASE_DIR/_archived_files_{timestamp}/
Create quarantine destination if used.
Log events to 00_EXECUTION_LOG.jsonl.
acceptance: All required folders exist

task_index.name: Execute Moves and Exports (Grouped)
task_index.objective: Apply the Move Map deterministically with full logging and safe conflict behavior, per group.
actions: If PAPER_MOVE_MAP_ONLY=true: do not modify filesystem; write an execution log event indicating 'paper_only'.
Else if DRY_RUN=true: simulate actions; write logs; do not modify filesystem.
Else: for each group in stable order: for each Move Map row in stable order: perform move/export/keep/quarantine.
Preserve relative path when exporting; avoid overwrites; on conflict skip + log.
Emit 00_EXPORT_LOG.csv and append event logs.
If INVENTORY_REFRESH_PER_GROUP=true and not DRY_RUN and not PAPER_MOVE_MAP_ONLY: re-run inventory (T01) after each group completes.
acceptance: All non-skipped actions executed as logged
No silent overwrites occurred
Exports exist at archive destination

task_index.name: Post-Execution Hygiene
task_index.objective: Remove empty directories (within allowed scope) and normalize layout.
actions: Identify empty folders created or left behind.
Remove empty folders except protected/excluded directories.
Log removals.
acceptance: No empty junk directories remain (except excluded/protected)
failure_modes: Accidental deletion outside scope (must be prevented)

task_index.name: Verification and Reconciliation (Staged vs Final)
task_index.objective: Prove outcome correctness with counts and integrity checks; avoid final-location assumptions in staging mode.
actions: Compute post-inventory in TARGET_DIR.
Compute exported_count from export log.
Check reconciliation math; record results.
If HASH_MODE=sha256 and DRY_RUN=false: spot-check or full-check moved file hashes where feasible.
If FINALIZATION_MODE=final: run DIR_TYPE checks (code: import/test smoke; docs: link check; schema: schema validation if configured).
If FINALIZATION_MODE=staging: skip mandatory reference rewrite checks and skip registry/ledger commitments; record as deferred in report.
Write 00_VERIFY_REPORT.md.
acceptance: Reconciliation math closes
No critical integrity failures
Verification report is complete and readable

task_index.name: Generate Root README
task_index.objective: Create/refresh navigation documentation for the organized directory.
actions: Write 00_README.md describing buckets, intended usage, and operator notes.
Include archive export destination and run_id.
Include group outcomes and any deferred finalization actions (if staging).
Optionally include a short 'How to rerun' section referencing inputs.
acceptance: README exists at TARGET_DIR root and reflects actual structure

task_index.name: Generate Rollback Script
task_index.objective: Enable recovery by producing a reverse operation script derived from the Move Map and actual execution log.
actions: Parse execution log to identify executed moves/exports.
Generate 00_ROLLBACK.ps1 that reverses moves and optionally restores exports from archive.
Mark rollback as best-effort (skip if destination occupied).
acceptance: Rollback script generated and references actual executed actions

task_index.name: Finalization (Optional)
task_index.objective: Only in FINALIZATION_MODE=final: perform the expensive steps that assume stable final locations.
actions: If ID_MODE=enforce_and_rename: perform file_id and dir_id renames as planned; update Move Map and logs.
Perform reference rewrites (imports/includes/manifests/CI) as required and log changes.
If REGISTRY_MODE=full: perform required registry/ledger updates (reservations/commitments) and record evidence.
Re-run verification checks with final mode requirements.
acceptance: All required rewrites completed
Registry/ledger updates completed (if enabled)
Final verification passes

success: Proceed gate satisfied per group (or PAPER_MOVE_MAP_ONLY=true)
Execution completed (or dry-run completed) per group
failure: Unexpected filesystem modification detected during dry-run
